news.t: 'Go-to place to get liquidity': ETF efficiency amid the SVB collapse
‘They can actually derisk their portfolios': Here's where BlackRock is seeing iShares bond ETFs garner inflows amid climbing bond yields
Top ETFs To Buy Amid Current Stock Market Correction

overview.description: The iShares Trust iShares 0-1 Year Treasury Bond ETF (SHV) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in investment grade fixed income. The fund tracks a market-weighted index of debt securities issued by the U.S. Treasury SHV was launched on Jan 5, 2007 and is issued by BlackRock.
infoTable: ICE BofA Short US Treasury Securities

data.title: 'Go-to place to get liquidity': ETF efficiency amid the SVB collapse
data.text: While the recent fallout in the banking sector has weighed on indexes, some experts say the volatility has shined a light on the efficiency of the ETF market.

data.text: Bonds in portfolios have disappointed many investors over the past decade, but some fund managers expect a big resurgence. CNBC's Kristina Partsinevelos joins 'Squawk on the Street' with the details.
